chunks.text: Our Students - EECS at Berkeley Berkeley faculty, staff, and students attend the 2023 CMD-IT/ACM RICHARD TAPIA Conference Our Students Current graduate and undergraduate students, participated in the 2023 ACM Richard Tapia Celebration of Diversity in Computing conference in San Diego along with current EECS faculty and staff.
